title: artemisia eriopoda var. rotundifolia
intro: Artemisia eriopoda var. rotundifolia, commonly known as silver wormwood, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of silver wormwood include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief and anxiety. Silver wormwood is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
